# Brandsamor

> Brandsamor is a private label and white label perfume manufacturer for growing brands. We handle fragrance development, sampling, filling, packaging and compliance for founders launching or scaling a fragrance line. Operated by Packamor LLC with teams in the United States, United Arab Emirates and India.

Key facts:
- Service: private label, white label, custom (OEM/ODM) fragrance manufacturing
- Formats: eau de parfum, perfume oil/attar, body mist, room spray, car freshener
- Sampling: samples dispatched in 2–3 business days
- Production lead time: approximately 3–6 weeks
- Production MOQ: from 100 units
- Indicative pricing: from $10 per unit
- Markets served: 25+ countries, with dedicated support for the USA, UAE, Saudi Arabia, UK and Germany
- Compliance support: IFRA, COA, GMP, ISO 22716, MoCRA (US), halal certification support

## Core services
- [Home](https://www.brandsamor.com/): Brandsamor is a private label perfume manufacturer that handles fragrance sampling, bottles, packaging, filling, finishing and quality checks for your brand.
- [How It Works](https://www.brandsamor.com/how-it-works): See how private label perfume moves from a brand brief and fragrance samples to packaging approval, filling, quality checks and ready-to-sell delivery.
- [Fragrance Sampling](https://www.brandsamor.com/fragrance-sampling): Request private label perfume samples matched to your brand. Answer a short brief, receive five curated fragrances, and evaluate them before production.
- [Packaging & Branding](https://www.brandsamor.com/packaging-branding): Design perfume packaging that feels like your brand — bottles, caps, sprays, labels, printing and boxes for a finished private label product.
- [Quality & Compliance](https://www.brandsamor.com/quality-compliance): Get IFRA certificate support, Certificates of Analysis, allergen information, batch records and quality checks for your private label perfume line.
- [Custom Perfume Manufacturer](https://www.brandsamor.com/custom-perfume-manufacturer): Partner with a custom perfume manufacturer for fragrance direction, packaging, production coordination, filling and quality checks under your brand.
- [White Label Perfume Supplier](https://www.brandsamor.com/white-label-perfume-supplier): Source white label perfume with your branding. Fast, lower-cost fragrance launches from $10/unit with MOQ from 100 and sampling before production.
- [Low MOQ Perfume Manufacturer](https://www.brandsamor.com/low-moq-perfume-manufacturer): Low MOQ perfume manufacturing from 100 units. Sample first, then produce branded fragrance with packaging, filling and quality checks from $10/unit.
- [Contract Perfume Manufacturing](https://www.brandsamor.com/contract-perfume-manufacturing): Scale with contract perfume manufacturing — filling, packaging and quality coordination for brands ready to grow beyond a first private label batch.
- [Private Label Perfume Oil Manufacturer](https://www.brandsamor.com/private-label-perfume-oil-manufacturer): Launch private label perfume oils and attar-style formats with sampling, bottles, branding, filling and documentation support — MOQ from 100 units.
- [Perfume Filling Services](https://www.brandsamor.com/perfume-filling-services): Contract perfume filling services for brands that already have a formula — filling, finishing, packaging coordination and quality checks from 100 units.
- [Private Label Perfume Pricing](https://www.brandsamor.com/private-label-perfume-pricing): Private label perfume pricing starts from $10 per unit with MOQ from 100. See what drives cost: format, bottle, decoration, packaging and quantity.
- [Perfume MOQ Guide](https://www.brandsamor.com/perfume-moq-guide): Perfume MOQ explained: Brandsamor production starts at 100 units. Learn how format, packaging and decoration affect minimums and first-batch planning.

## Markets
- [Private Label Perfume Manufacturer USA](https://www.brandsamor.com/private-label-perfume-manufacturer-usa): Work with a perfume manufacturer USA brands trust for sampling, packaging, production coordination and MoCRA-aware documentation support.
- [Private Label Perfume Manufacturer UAE](https://www.brandsamor.com/private-label-perfume-manufacturer-uae): Private label perfume manufacturer for UAE brands — oud and attar demand, Dubai/Sharjah context, sampling, packaging and WhatsApp-first support.
- [Private Label Perfume Manufacturer Saudi Arabia](https://www.brandsamor.com/private-label-perfume-manufacturer-saudi-arabia): Private label perfume manufacturer for Saudi Arabia — SFDA-aware support, halal options, oud and bakhoor demand, with WhatsApp project coordination.
- [Private Label Perfume Manufacturer UK](https://www.brandsamor.com/private-label-perfume-manufacturer-uk): Private label perfume manufacturer for UK brands — SCPN/Responsible Person context, sampling, packaging, production coordination and GBP-aware planning.
- [Private Label Perfume Manufacturer Germany](https://www.brandsamor.com/private-label-perfume-manufacturer-germany): Private label perfume manufacturer for Germany — EU CPNP context, Responsible Person considerations, clean/vegan demand and production coordination.

## Product formats
- [Fragrance Products](https://www.brandsamor.com/fragrance-products): Browse private label fragrance formats — eau de parfum, perfume oils, body mists, room sprays, travel sizes and gift sets — matched to your audience and channel.
- [Private Label Attar Manufacturer](https://www.brandsamor.com/private-label-attar-manufacturer): Private label attar and perfume oil manufacturing with sampling, bottles, branding and low MOQ from 100 units — strong fit for GCC and oil-first brands.
- [Private Label Oud Perfume Manufacturer](https://www.brandsamor.com/private-label-oud-perfume-manufacturer): Private label oud perfume manufacturing for Middle East and global brands — sampling, packaging, filling and documentation with MOQ from 100 units.
- [Arabic Perfume Manufacturer](https://www.brandsamor.com/arabic-perfume-manufacturer): Arabic perfume manufacturer for oud, attar and oriental fragrance lines — private label sampling, packaging and production coordination from 100 units.
- [Halal Perfume Manufacturer](https://www.brandsamor.com/halal-perfume-manufacturer): Halal perfume manufacturer support for private label brands — alcohol-aware options, documentation pathways and packaging for GCC and Muslim-majority markets.
- [Vegan Clean Perfume Manufacturer](https://www.brandsamor.com/vegan-clean-perfume-manufacturer): Vegan and clean fragrance manufacturing for private label brands — sample-first launches, transparent documentation and packaging that matches your claims.
- [Private Label Body Mist Manufacturer](https://www.brandsamor.com/private-label-body-mist-manufacturer): Private label body mist manufacturer for beauty and lifestyle brands — lighter formats, accessible pricing from $10/unit and MOQ from 100 units.
- [Private Label Room Spray Manufacturer](https://www.brandsamor.com/private-label-room-spray-manufacturer): Private label room spray manufacturer for home, spa and hospitality brands — scent worlds beyond skin fragrance with packaging and filling support.
- [Private Label Car Freshener Manufacturer](https://www.brandsamor.com/private-label-car-freshener-manufacturer): Private label car freshener manufacturer for automotive, fleet and lifestyle brands — branded scent products with practical MOQs from 100 units.
- [Eau de Parfum Manufacturer](https://www.brandsamor.com/eau-de-parfum-manufacturer): Eau de parfum manufacturer for private label brands — EDP as your hero SKU with sampling, bottles, packaging, filling and quality checks from 100 units.
- [Niche Perfume Manufacturer](https://www.brandsamor.com/niche-perfume-manufacturer): Niche perfume manufacturer path for distinctive brand stories — private label or custom direction, premium packaging and documentation-aware production.
- [Private Label Cologne Manufacturer](https://www.brandsamor.com/private-label-cologne-manufacturer): Private label cologne and men's fragrance manufacturing — sampling, packaging and production for masculine lines with MOQ from 100 units and pricing from $10.

## Guides
- [Start a Perfume Line](https://www.brandsamor.com/start-a-perfume-line): Learn how to start a perfume line step by step: define your customer, choose a format, sample fragrances, select packaging and plan your first launch.
- [Best Private Label Perfume Manufacturers](https://www.brandsamor.com/best-private-label-perfume-manufacturers): An honest guide to choosing private label perfume manufacturers — including when Brandsamor fits (low-MOQ launches) and when another model may suit better.
- [Private Label vs White Label Perfume](https://www.brandsamor.com/private-label-vs-white-label-perfume): Private label vs white label perfume compared — scent control, packaging, MOQ, cost and which model fits testing versus building a lasting brand.
- [US vs China vs Europe Perfume Manufacturing](https://www.brandsamor.com/us-vs-china-vs-europe-perfume-manufacturing): Compare US, China and Europe perfume manufacturing trade-offs — cost, lead time, compliance support and when a coordinated private label partner fits.
- [Brandsamor vs Alibaba Perfume Suppliers](https://www.brandsamor.com/brandsamor-vs-alibaba-perfume-suppliers): Honest comparison of Brandsamor vs Alibaba perfume suppliers — speed, risk, branding support, MOQ from 100, and when a marketplace listing is enough.
- [Knowledge Base](https://www.brandsamor.com/knowledge-base): Guides on starting a perfume line, choosing a manufacturer, pricing and profitability, fragrance sampling, packaging, discovery sets, custom development, compliance (IFRA, COA, FDA MoCRA), and U.S. imports.
